author: BanyanSo
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. A lightweight Memos entry for Obsidian: quick capture, daily context, monthly collection, and local-first control.

manifest.author: BanyanSo
manifest.description: Capture local-first memos into daily notes and monthly archives.
manifest.name: Knomo

name: Knomo

releases.author: BanyanSo
releases.description:
### What's New  
  
- Added support for displaying the interface in Chinese or English based on the current Obsidian language.  
- Added support for applying the Daily Notes template when creating daily notes.  
- Improved the interaction and performance of `#tag` autocompletion in the input box.
  
### Fixed  
  
- Fixed an issue where the image button on mobile did not respond when clicked.  
- Fixed an issue where blank lines could be removed when writing a Memo.  
- Fixed an issue where tags with different letter casing were counted separately in the sidebar.
  
---  

## 中文  
  
### 新增  
  
- 支持根据 Obsidian 当前语言显示中文或英文界面。  
- 支持应用 Daily Notes 配置的模板创建日记。  
- 改进输入框中的 [#tag](https://github.com/BanyanSo/knomo/releases/new?tag=0.5.0#tag) 自动补全的交互和性能。  
  
### 修复  
  
- 修复移动端图片按钮点击无响应的问题。  
- 修复写入 Memo 时可能删除空行的问题。  
- 修复侧边栏标签字母大小分开统计的问题。
releases.name: Knomo 0.5.0

releases.author: BanyanSo
releases.description:
## Knomo 0.4.0

Initial public release.

### Features

- Quick memo capture
- Write memos to Daily Notes
- Automatically maintain monthly Memos Markdown files
- Card-based memo browsing
- Tags and search
- Import time-formatted list items from existing Daily Notes
- Mobile-friendly composer and navigation improvements
- Minimal theme compatibility

### Notes

- Knomo depends on Obsidian's core Daily Notes plugin.
- Please back up your Vault before importing existing Daily Note content.
releases.name: Knomo 0.4.0
